title: FIFA World Cup 2026 LIVE scores, Day 9: Scotland vs Morocco results, latest news; Australia vs USA highlights; Mike Grella mocks Irankunda with crotch grab; Brazil vs Haiti highlights; Paraguay vs Turkiye highlights; Paraguay player handed red card for shock new rule, Türkiye eliminated despite historic red card, Socceroos handed Group D showdown | Nine.com.au
fetched: raw-HTML 直抓 + 抽取(jsonld:articleBody) + 清洗（逐字、未经任何模型/改写/翻译）
original_text: A player covering their mouth with their hand or shirt in a confrontation situation can be sent off with a red card, and we’ve seen that happen in this game between Paraguay and Türkiye. Paraguay’s Miguel Almirón covered his mouth while saying something to a Türkiye player, that was flagged by the group and the VAR has decided that it constitutes a red card. Almirón is sent off for the incident, a new rule for this 2026 World Cup. This is the first time this rule has ever been implemented and Paraguay is now down to 10 players.
